name: Sim: Baggage - Lost luggage on ZA554
scenario_description: Passenger reports checked bag was not transferred at San Francisco. Bag last scanned at origin but did not arrive in Seattle.
complaint_description: I flew ZA554 on March 9 2026 from San Francisco to Seattle. My checked bag was scanned at departure but never arrived at baggage claim in Seattle. The baggage office filed PIR reference BGA-554-001. I have a business meeting tomorrow and have no equipment. I need Lunar Air to locate my bag within 24 hours or provide compensation for emergency purchases.
